story.currentText:
[RIGHT ANSWER] You flawlessly executed your action! You gain +1 Heart (+20 Health), +5 Mana, and +50 Gold!

You gather your belongings and travel carefully to the Daejeon Station. The air shifts as you cross boundaries, feeling the tense atmosphere of this new sector. You gain 15 XP. You encounter Survivor Jack, who looks at you with a apprehensive expression. 

*[STORY FLOW: You are currently Level 1/5 (25/100 XP). Perform actions, defeat enemies, and explore locations to gain XP. Reaching Level 5 unlocks the final boss fight!]*

quest.title: Survive to Busan
quest.description: Make your way through infected carriages of the speeding train to reach the safe engine room and escape to Busan.

scene.background: Inside a speeding high-tech train compartment, blood splatters, shattered glass, frantic passengers, hyper-fast zombies scratching at the glass doors, dramatic horror cinematic digital art

npc.name: Survivor Jack
npc.dialogue: Thank goodness, another human. Stay quiet, they are attracted to fast movements.
